acceptance_criteria: Shared status contract constants and renderer enforce strict Done/Next/Blocked output ordering
quality_guards: Status line prefixes come from canonical constants only
diff:
scripts/pipeline_driver_contracts.py            | 29 +++++++++++++++++++++++++
 tests/contract/test_pipeline_driver_contract.py | 23 ++++++++++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 52 insertions(+)

diff --git a/scripts/pipeline_driver_contracts.py b/scripts/pipeline_driver_contracts.py
index fb14c29..8412082 100755
--- a/scripts/pipeline_driver_contracts.py
+++ b/scripts/pipeline_driver_contracts.py
@@ -21,6 +21,12 @@ DRIVER_MODE_ALIASES: dict[str, str] = {
     "passthrough": "legacy",
     "unmanaged": "legacy",
 }
+STATUS_KEYS: tuple[str, str, str] = ("done", "next", "blocked")
+STATUS_PREFIXES: dict[str, str] = {
+    "done": "Done:",
+    "next": "Next:",
+    "blocked": "Blocked:",
+}
 
 
 def _require_mapping(value: Any) -> Mapping[str, Any]:
@@ -173,3 +179,26 @@ def load_driver_routes(manifest_path: str | Path | None = None) -> dict[str, dic
         }
 
     return routes
+
+
+def _normalize_status_value(raw_value: Any) -> str:
+    if not isinstance(raw_value, str):
+        return "none"
+    normalized = raw_value.strip()
+    return normalized if normalized else "none"
+
+
+def render_status_lines(
+    *,
+    done: str | None,
+    next_step: str | None,
+    blocked: str | None = None,
+) -> list[str]:
+    """Render the strict three-line human status contract in canonical order."""
+
+    status_values = {
+        "done": _normalize_status_value(done),
+        "next": _normalize_status_value(next_step),
+        "blocked": _normalize_status_value(blocked),
+    }
+    return [f"{STATUS_PREFIXES[key]} {status_values[key]}" for key in STATUS_KEYS]
diff --git a/tests/contract/test_pipeline_driver_contract.py b/tests/contract/test_pipeline_driver_contract.py
index 818c15a..ba7db1d 100644
--- a/tests/contract/test_pipeline_driver_contract.py
+++ b/tests/contract/test_pipeline_driver_contract.py
@@ -49,3 +49,26 @@ def test_parse_step_result_rejects_missing_schema_version() -> None:
                 "correlation_id": "019:setup:test",
             }
         )
+
+
+def test_render_status_lines_strict_three_line_contract() -> None:
+    lines = contracts.render_status_lines(
+        done="plan gate passed",
+        next_step="run speckit.solution",
+        blocked="none",
+    )
+    assert lines == [
+        "Done: plan gate passed",
+        "Next: run speckit.solution",
+        "Blocked: none",
+    ]
+    assert tuple(contracts.STATUS_KEYS) == ("done", "next", "blocked")
+
+
+def test_render_status_lines_normalizes_empty_values() -> None:
+    lines = contracts.render_status_lines(done="", next_step=None, blocked="   ")
+    assert lines == [
+        "Done: none",
+        "Next: none",
+        "Blocked: none",
+    ]

test_runs.command: .venv/bin/python scripts/speckit_implement_gate.py validate-task-evidence --task-kind module --tests-passed pass --smoke-exit 0 --state-safety pass --transaction-integrity pass --async-safety pass --observability pass --json
